active.description: Structural Triage Engine — scans TypeScript/Python codebases via AST, detects ty
Consumes ssot-auditor output and applies safe, low-risk codemod plans automatica
Configuration drift detection — compares narrative (docs) vs live system state,
Scans package.json files for version conflicts, misplaced dev deps, and unused d
Recursively traverses git history, agent registries, governance files, and hando
Scans a target repository for the required modules defined in CHATBOT_SSOT and r
Finds dead exports, orphan files, and empty stubs across any TypeScript codebase
Scans any target repo against the EGOS kernel's shared capabilities, governance
Estimates remaining usable context window (CTX 0-280) from uncommitted files, se
Benchmarks MASA and competing agent/orchestration frameworks from official docs
Routes incoming MCP server discovery requests to the correct handler based on ca
Validates spec pipeline stage fields, detects current stage, routes to next revi
